response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-04:28: Analyzed intro and product announcements. 2. 04:28-04:52: Identified the song segment 'The Beginning' (part of the 12-month project). Transcribed the lyrics displayed on-screen. 3. 04:52-05:01: Analyzed outro.
response.global_summary: A video documenting Yuzuki Choco's 2026 birthday celebration, featuring announcements about new merchandise, voice packs, and a new original song project called 'The Beginning', which will release 12 original songs over 12 consecutive months.

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco talks to the audience about new birthday merchandise, including a chocolate mould, a plushie key holder, voice packs, and a full set with special bonuses.
A short original song from the 'The Beginning' project plays with on-screen lyrics. The performer dances while the song plays.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
...ねえ ちょこたちもう二度と会えないの？
不思議ね。キミの言葉を聞くと
なんだか元気が出てきちゃう
ちょこのことをもっともっと、大好きになってほしい
もう一度、会いたいよ。
い感情も、孤独な気持ちも...
ちょこが全部食べてあげるわ
ちょこが小悪魔なんだから
ねえ、もしよればキミに...
ちょこの思い出話、聞いてほしいの。
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
...Hey, Choco-tachi, can we really never meet again?
It's strange. When I hear your words,
I feel a little energized.
I want you to love Choco more and more.
I want to see you again.
Painful feelings, lonely feelings too...
Choco will eat them all up for you.
Because Choco is a little devil, you see.
Hey, if you're willing, to you...
I want you to hear Choco's memories.

scenes.description: Yuzuki Choco wraps up the announcement, reiterating the project's details and waving goodbye.
